reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw USD. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues - Income statement line labeled Revenue
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue - Income statement line labeled Cost of revenue
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit - Income statement line labeled Gross profit (explicitly reported)
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss - Income statement line labeled Income from operations
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest - Income statement line labeled Income before income tax
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit - Income statement line labeled Income tax expense
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss - Income statement and cash flow statement starting line labeled Net income; both match at 2043 for Q1 FY2024; no noncontrolling interest disclosed so consolidated equals parent
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpense - Income statement line labeled Interest expense; reported gross separately from Interest income; displayed in parentheses indicating expense; negated per policy
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense - Cash flow statement addback labeled Stock-based compensation expense
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization - Cash flow statement addback labeled Depreciation and amortization; single line captures all D&A
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding - Income statement line labeled Diluted weighted average shares; reported in millions, converted to raw count
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue - Balance sheet line labeled Cash and cash equivalents
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent - Balance sheet line labeled Marketable securities (current)
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent - Balance sheet line labeled Accounts receivable, net
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet - Balance sheet line labeled Inventories
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent - Balance sheet line labeled Accounts payable; reported as standalone line, no combination needed
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets - Balance sheet line labeled Total assets
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity - Balance sheet line labeled Total shareholders equity; no noncontrolling interest present
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent - Balance sheet line labeled Short-term debt
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent - Balance sheet line labeled Long-term debt
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current portion: embedded in us-gaap:AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent (not broken out on face of balance sheet; cross-statement check confirms long-term is 939M); non-current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities = 939M. Current operating lease liability is not separately disclosed on the balance sheet face; it is included within Accrued and other current liabilities. From supplemental lease data (us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments = 61M in Q1 FY2024) the current portion can be estimated but is not explicitly broken out. For total operating lease liabilities, only the non-current amount of 939M is confirmed on the balance sheet face. NOTE: current operating lease liability is not separately available from this filing extraction; total is therefore approximated as non-current only (939M) unless notes provide current breakout not present in this extraction.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities - Cash flow statement line labeled Net cash provided by operating activities
company_mapping.capex: nvda:PurchasesOfPropertyAndEquipmentAndIntangibleAssets - Cash flow investing line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets; reported negative (outflow); retained as negative per policy
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired - Cash flow investing line labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired; reported negative (outflow); retained as negative per policy
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense - Income statement line labeled Research and development
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest - Income statement line labeled Interest income; needed for metric 16 gross interest check and metric 21 unlevered FCF
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent - Balance sheet line labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities
company_mapping.operating_lease_payments_cash: us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments - Supplemental cash flow in lease note (xbrl_not_on_statement); needed as proxy for cash paid for interest cross-check and lease context
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not explicitly disclosed as a supplemental cash flow item in this extraction; metric 21 will use income statement interest expense as approximation per formula rules
company_mapping.sga_expense: us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense - Income statement line labeled Sales, general and administrative
company_mapping.acquisition_termination_cost: nvda:BusinessCombinationAdvancedConsiderationWrittenOff - Income statement and cash flow line labeled Acquisition termination cost
company_mapping.diluted_eps: us-gaap:EarningsPerShareDiluted - Income statement line labeled Diluted net income per share
company_mapping.basic_eps: us-gaap:EarningsPerShareBasic - Income statement line labeled Basic net income per share
company_mapping.basic_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfSharesOutstandingBasic - Income statement line labeled Basic weighted average shares
company_mapping.shares_outstanding: us-gaap:CommonStockSharesOutstanding - XBRL not on statement; balance sheet equity section disclosure
